title: Deleting the additional axes
description:
Deleting the additional axes

Deleting the additional axes

Note: When the additional T axis is installed, delete it first.

When only the additional S axis is installed, delete it.

Select System Configuration form the Setup menu.
Under the Robot folder in the tree on the left, select Robot** | Additional Axes

Click Delete and the next dialog will appear

Click Yes and the controller will be rebooted.
